# System Capability Catalog

<!-- generated by scripts/ai/aq-capability-catalog render-doc; edit config/system-capability-catalog.json instead -->

Status: Active
Owner: codex
Last Updated: 2026-06-29

Version: `2026-06-29`
Source of truth: `config/system-capability-catalog.json`
External ingestion gate: `capability-intake`

## Use

- Agents should search this catalog before adding tools, plugins, MCP servers, datasets, workflows, or feature surfaces.
- External candidates remain deny-by-default until `capability-intake` records admission, mitigations, and validation.
- Parity discovery should compare each entry's `parity_targets` against mature external repos, then open a bounded capability-intake slice for any proposed ingestion.
- Suggested external repo candidates live in `config/suggested-ai-repo-candidates.json`; they are research inputs, not enabled capabilities.

| ID | Category | Kind | State | Security | Agents | Validation |

## Entries

### local-agent-delegation

Runs long local inference tasks through direct, agent, hybrid, or auto delegation lanes.

- Name: Local Agent Delegation
- Owner: local-agent
- Maturity: production
- State: enabled
- Primary refs: `scripts/ai/delegate-to-local`, `docs/architecture/local-agent-task-eligibility.md`
- Data stores: `agent-memory-episodic`, `agent-memory-semantic`, `agent-memory-procedural`
- Parity targets: local coding agents, agentic loop runners, long-context local inference
- Security gate: `python3 scripts/testing/test-delegate-local-agent.py`

### auto-skill-selection

Selects and validates local skills for agent prompts without a human choosing each skill.

- Name: Automatic Skill Selection
- Owner: agent-runtime
- Maturity: production
- State: enabled
- Primary refs: `scripts/ai/aq-skill-auto`, `scripts/testing/test-skill-auto.py`
- Data stores: `skills-patterns`
- Parity targets: Claude skills, Codex skills, OpenAI plugin skill bundles
- Security gate: `scripts/testing/check-skill-source-of-truth.sh`

### tooling-manifest

Compact code-execution-friendly tool catalog used to auto-select workflow tools from user intent.

- Name: Tooling Manifest and Auto Tool Routing
- Owner: hybrid-coordinator
- Maturity: production
- State: enabled
- Primary refs: `ai-stack/mcp-servers/hybrid-coordinator/knowledge/tooling_manifest.py`
- Data stores: `codebase-context`, `skills-patterns`, `error-solutions`
- Parity targets: MCP registry discovery, LangGraph tool routers, AutoGen tool selection
- Security gate: `python3 scripts/testing/test-tooling-manifest.py`

### playwright-mcp

Headless browser automation for dashboard and website validation.

- Name: Playwright MCP
- Owner: qa-automation
- Maturity: official
- State: enabled
- Primary refs: `config/agent-capability-intake-candidates.json`, `.agent/skills/webapp-testing/SKILL.md`
- Data stores: none
- Parity targets: browser-use agents, Playwright MCP releases, visual regression agents
- Security gate: `python3 scripts/testing/test-enabled-external-mcp-candidates.py`

### understand-anything

Codebase graph generation, dashboard visualization, diff impact, and graph-backed explanations.

- Name: Understand Anything Graph Skills
- Owner: agent-runtime
- Maturity: integrated
- State: enabled
- Primary refs: `.agent/skills/understand-anything/SKILL.md`, `scripts/ai/aq-understand-anything`
- Data stores: `codebase-context`
- Parity targets: repo graph agents, impact analysis tools, codebase visualization systems
- Security gate: `scripts/ai/aq-understand-anything ensure`

### aidb-rag-stores

AIDB, Qdrant, Postgres, and Redis-backed knowledge, memory, telemetry, and interaction collections.

- Name: AIDB and RAG Stores
- Owner: rag-operations
- Maturity: production
- State: enabled
- Primary refs: `docs/architecture/memory-system-design.md`, `docs/agent-guides/30-QDRANT-OPERATIONS.md`
- Data stores: `knowledge`, `codebase-context`, `skills-patterns`, `error-solutions`, `best-practices`, `interaction-history`, `agent-memory-episodic`, `agent-memory-semantic`, `agent-memory-procedural`
- Parity targets: agent memory stores, RAG vector databases, long-term learning stores
- Security gate: `curl -sS --max-time 10 http://127.0.0.1:8002/health`

### dashboard-observability

Operator-facing telemetry, dashboard cards, aq-report machine output, and health gates.

- Name: Dashboard and aq-report Observability
- Owner: qa-automation
- Maturity: production
- State: enabled
- Primary refs: `dashboard/backend/api/services/ai_insights.py`, `scripts/ai/aq-report`
- Data stores: `telemetry_events`, `query_traces`, `learning_feedback`
- Parity targets: agent observability dashboards, OpenTelemetry GenAI surfaces, AI runtime scorecards
- Security gate: `AQ_QA_SKIP_REPORT_BACKED_CHECKS=1 scripts/ai/aq-qa 0 --machine`

### osint-research-store

- Name: Passive OSINT Research Store
- Owner: osint-systems
- Maturity: integrated
- State: enabled
- Primary refs: `scripts/testing/test-osint-research-ingest.py`, `.agent/OSINT-SYSTEMS-INSTRUCTIONS.md`
- Data stores: `osint-intelligence`
- Parity targets: public-source research pipelines, STIX-like evidence stores, browser-assisted research agents
- Security gate: `python3 scripts/testing/test-osint-research-ingest.py`

### github-mcp-readonly

Read-only GitHub repository and PR intelligence; blocked until token scope and runtime are reviewed.

- Name: GitHub MCP Read-only
- Owner: agent-runtime
- Maturity: official
- State: blocked-auth-runtime
- Primary refs: `config/agent-capability-intake-candidates.json`
- Data stores: none
- Parity targets: GitHub MCP releases, code review agents, CI diagnosis agents
- Security gate: `scripts/ai/aq-capability-intake audit github-mcp-readonly --json`

### capability-intake

Deny-by-default admission workflow for external tools, plugins, skills, and MCP servers.

- Name: Capability Intake
- Owner: security-systems
- Maturity: production
- State: enabled
- Primary refs: `scripts/ai/aq-capability-intake`, `.agent/skills/capability-intake/SKILL.md`
- Data stores: none
- Parity targets: mcp security gateways, plugin registries, agent tool admission controllers
